rationale: Hard pass for this game. The dark, noir crime-scene aesthetic (navy/yellow-tape palette, nighttime suburban 3D render) directly clashes with the bright, calm, candy-colored connect-the-dots DNA, and there is no plausible bridge from a forensic photographer hook into a color-matching line-drawing loop without feeling like a bait-and-switch. Audience also skews thriller/mystery-curious rather than the slightly-female casual relaxer this title targets — only worth testing if the team builds a custom 'mystery puzzle' meta layer, otherwise skip.
